summary: Comprehensive testing of Reports module (7 tabs) and enhanced Clients page. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height (-1) - charts are rendering but showing warning messages about container dimensions. Minor cosmetic issue, charts still display correctly.

backend: Auth: admin login works with provided credentials
/api/reports/transactions-detailed: Returns summary, deposits_by_currency, withdrawals_by_currency
/api/reports/transactions-detailed: Date filter works correctly
/api/reports/transactions-detailed: Base currency breakdown has USD equivalent
/api/reports/vendor-summary: Returns vendors array and grand_totals
/api/reports/vendor-summary: Net settlement = Deposits - Withdrawals - Commission
/api/reports/vendor-commissions: Returns commission breakdown by vendor
/api/reports/vendor-commissions: Shows deposit vs withdrawal commission split
/api/reports/client-balances: Returns clients with transaction summaries
/api/reports/client-balances: Net balance = Deposits - Withdrawals calculated correctly
/api/reports/treasury-summary: Returns accounts, total_balance_usd, balance_by_currency
/api/reports/treasury-summary: Balance grouped by currency with account counts
/api/reports/treasury-summary: Each account shows balance and USD equivalent
/api/reports/psp-summary: Returns PSPs with volume, commission, settled/pending counts
/api/reports/psp-summary: Grand totals calculated correctly
/api/reports/financial-summary: Returns income, expenses, net_profit_loss, loans, treasury
/api/reports/financial-summary: P&L = Income - Expenses calculated correctly
/api/reports/financial-summary: Loan summary shows disbursed, outstanding, repaid
/api/reports/transactions-summary: Returns chart data for last 30 days
All API responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all report tabs and client filters working)

seed_data_creation: Existing data: 1 client (safvan kappilakath) with 3 deposits ($60,750 USD) and 2 withdrawals ($22,950 USD). Net balance: $37,800. Treasury: 2 accounts (ENBD AED, ICIC INR) totaling $37,969.53. Vendor: kenway with $459 commission from withdrawals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports module fully tested - 7 tabs (Transactions, Vendors, Commissions, Clients, Treasury, PSP, Financial) all working with CSV export. All reports show base currency with USD equivalents. Clients page has enhanced filters: search, KYC status, transaction type (deposits/withdrawals/none), min/max balance, and export dropdown. Currency exchange rates are MOCKED in backend/server.py EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD dict.
